videos.title: Day 21/365 #minivlog #vlogging #365dayschallenge #palladiummall #alphaone #ahmedabad #bestplace
“1000 Saal Purana Swayambhu Shivling? 😳 Truth of gaspur Ahmedabad”#TempleMystery
videos.description:
In gesture Ahmedabad, there is a mysterious Shivling that many believe appeared on its own 😳
It is said that this Shivling was never स्थापित (established) by humans, but emerged naturally from the ground.
In earlier times, there was no village here—only a flowing river and open land.
Nomadic (Banjara) people used to visit this place and perform पूजा (worship) for years, turning it into a sacred spiritual site 🔱
However, according to Hindu scriptures, there are only 12 official Jyotirlingas in In
